summary: Backend-only verification completed for restored wc2026tracker features. Source restoration checks passed (routes/components/handlers present), build output includes Compare and Trophy3D chunks, local handler-level contracts pass, and public API checks pass for /api/stats?action=usage and /api/results. Public /api/health still fails with 404, indicating deployment mismatch.

critical.issue: Returns Vercel NOT_FOUND (404) instead of health JSON contract from api/health.js.

action_items: Redeploy same commit/branch to the preview URL so /api/health function is included in deployment artifacts.
Verify Vercel project root and function routing include /api/health alongside /api/stats and /api/results.
Re-run backend regression on the same public URL after redeploy.
critical_code_review_comments: Requested restored feature files exist in source: Compare page/route, ThemePicker, FavoriteButton, Trophy3D, MatchDayToday, MyTeams, ShareBracketModal.
Local production build succeeded and emitted Compare + Trophy3D chunks, confirming restoration compiles.
API handlers exist and are loadable in repo (/api/results.js, /api/stats.js, /api/health.js); current failure is deployment exposure mismatch, not source deletion.
seed_data_creation: Temporary TEST_T1_<uuid> key was written to /api/results during persistence test and restored to original payload.
context_for_next_testing_agent: This run added local handler contract tests and reran public endpoint suite against https://wc2026-nine-sepia.vercel.app. Results: local handler contracts 3/3 pass; public suite 4/5 pass with only /api/health failing 404.
rca of the issue: Repro: GET /api/health on the same host where /api/stats?action=usage and /api/results return 200. Observed response: plain-text Vercel NOT_FOUND 404. Since health.js exists and local handler contract passes, root cause is deployment/routing artifact mismatch for that function path. Mitigation: redeploy current branch and confirm serverless function registration for /api/health in the exact project/environment. MOCKED APIs: NONE.
